title: VOCATIONAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ALBERTINA KERR VOCATIONAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment and work experience opportunities by sub-contracting with local businesses. 424 NE 22nd Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Age 16 and older with a documented disability Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 239-8101 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 239-8101 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. A referral through Clackamas County Mental Health and Vocational Rehabilitation is suggested. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card, ID, documentation of disability, list of medications and dosages, medical and behavior protocol, and any special considerations AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Deschutes, Lincoln, Marion, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Disability Related Center Based Employment Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - I/DD EMPLOYMENT SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INCLUSIVE DAY SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESIDENTIAL CARE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ADULT GROUP HOMES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBERTINA KERR
